holdings.infoBox: IVSI is an equity ETF with a total of 198 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 6.51%, Roche Holding AG at 3.33%, BHP Group at 3.00%, Novartis AG at 2.23%, and Deutsche Telekom AG at 2.14%.

overview.description: The Applied Finance IVS International Large ETF (IVSI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF focusing on long-term capital appreciation by investing in large-cap stocks in developed international markets. The fund uses proprietary fundamental analysis to select holdings. IVSI was launched on Dec 11, 2025 and is issued by Applied Finance.
